name: CopilotFailureAnalysis
description: Analyzes pipeline failure logs using GitHub Copilot and provides root cause analysis with fix suggestions.
author: returngisorg

inputs.name: connectedServiceName
inputs.label: GitHub Copilot Service Connection
inputs.helpMarkDown: Select the GitHub service connection that contains a PAT with an active Copilot license.

inputs.name: maxLogLines
inputs.label: Max Log Lines Per Step
inputs.helpMarkDown: Maximum number of log lines to collect from each failed step (from the end).

inputs.name: copilotNpxTimeout
inputs.label: Copilot CLI Timeout (seconds)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Maximum time in seconds to wait for the Copilot CLI to respond.
